_comment: Editorial cut list for essay-shorts. Copy to <episode-dir>/clips.json. Segments are raw [start_seconds, end_seconds] pairs cut at sentence boundaries from work/sentences.txt (mid-sentence hook starts: snap to a word 'start' from work/transcript_raw.json minus ~0.04s). Segments play in listed order. HOUSE RULE: segment 1 is the punchline/hook pulled from wherever it occurs; the last segment's final sentence must flow back into the hook when the video loops. 'hook' is documentation for CLIPS.md, not used by the renderer.

clips.title: Short human-readable title
clips.hook: The punchline line that opens the clip
